title: Ghost Tales
content:
With leaves twitching
        the autumn air
        and the burnt almond
        breath of landscape
        heaving relief,
        the afternoon heavy-footedly
        walks across
        evening's threshold.

        II
        A garment is held high
        as adrenalin in the marble
        glow of wintery air.
        Mud puddles reflect the faery shrimp
        of clouds while cone-shaped
        coniferous trees perch on lawns like
        starlings.

        III
        High above to skating and
        sugar-icing rinks in misty hues,
        a ginger-bread man
        manoeuvres past the ghost tails of a dead
        luna moth.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Ghost Tales"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
